title: RBAC Admin Role-based Admin Menu Behavior

subtasks.title: Add Admin Session list page with full session table (superadmin only)
Add Admin Data (VFolder) list page without folder creation (superadmin only)
Add Admin Service (Serving) list page with modify/delete but no creation (superadmin only)

resolvedDecisions.summary: User page read-only in initial version
Domain admin can only set role to 'user'
Full management (modify+delete) for services; creation only from user menu
Folder creation only from user menu
